scenarios.scenario: You said hi to a coworker in the hallway. They walked past without responding.

options.text: They were ignoring me on purpose.
They didn't notice me.
I must have said something earlier that bugged them.
They're short with everyone, not just me.

scenarios.scenario: You sent a friend a long text last night and they still haven't replied.

options.text: They're upset about something I said.
They got busy and forgot.
I came on too strong with such a long message.
They don't really value the friendship.

scenarios.scenario: Your manager scheduled a one-on-one for tomorrow with no agenda. It's not on the regular cadence.

options.text: Something's wrong and I'm about to hear about it.
They probably just want to catch up.
I've been off my game lately and they noticed.
They have an update they want to share early.

scenarios.scenario: A driver cut you off in traffic and didn't signal.

options.text: They were being aggressive on purpose.
They were distracted or in a rush.
I was in their blind spot.
People drive like this everywhere now.

scenarios.scenario: You shared an idea in a meeting. The room went quiet, then someone pivoted to the next topic.

options.text: Everyone thought the idea was bad.
People were still thinking it over.
I didn't explain it clearly enough.
The group always shuts down ideas that aren't from the leads.

scenarios.scenario: Your neighbor has been short with you for the past few days. Nothing obvious happened between you.

options.text: They've decided they don't like me.
They're going through something unrelated.
I did something to annoy them and I don't remember what.
They're like this with everyone in the building.

scenarios.scenario: You're at a party. Two people are talking and glance over at you a few times.

options.text: They're talking about me.
I'm standing near the door they keep looking at.
There's something off about how I'm dressed.
They recognize me from somewhere.

scenarios.scenario: You apply for a role and don't hear back for two weeks.

options.text: They didn't think I was a fit and didn't bother to say.
Hiring is slow this time of year.
My resume didn't make a strong enough case.
They already had someone in mind from the start.
